testcase.name: test_message_strips_html

failure.message: AssertionError: Private message endpoint did NOT strip HTML tags - sanitize missing assert '<' not in 'Hello' '<' is contained here: Hello teacher ? +

testcase.failure: tests/test_input_validation_moderation.py:149: in test_message_strips_html assert "<" not in r.json()["content"], ( E AssertionError: Private message endpoint did NOT strip HTML tags - sanitize missing E assert '<' not in 'Hello' E E '<' is contained here: E Hello teacher E ? +

testcase.name: test_message_truncates_to_2000

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected truncation to 2000, got 2500 assert 2500 == 2000 + where 2500 = len('...')

testcase.failure: tests/test_input_validation_moderation.py:157: in test_message_truncates_to_2000 assert len(r.json()["content"]) == 2000, ( E AssertionError: Expected truncation to 2000, got 2500 E assert 2500 == 2000 E + where 2500 = len('...')
